tasks.label: Deploy: hydrogen-atom → bonner-gpu
tasks.command: rsync -az --info=progress2 hydrogen-atom/hydrogen-3d.js hydrogen-atom/hydrogen-3d.css bonner-gpu.rice.edu:/var/www/html/bonner-gpu/bm/hydrogen-atom/ && rsync -az hydrogen-atom/hydrogen-3d.html bonner-gpu.rice.edu:/var/www/html/bonner-gpu/bm/hydrogen-atom/index.html && echo '✓ hydrogen-atom deployed'

tasks.label: Deploy: stern-gerlach → bonner-gpu
tasks.command: cd stern-gerlach && npm run build && cd .. && rsync -az --info=progress2 stern-gerlach/dist/ bonner-gpu.rice.edu:/var/www/html/bonner-gpu/bm/stern-gerlach/ && echo '✓ stern-gerlach deployed'

tasks.label: Deploy: measurement → bonner-gpu
tasks.command: cd measurement && npm run build && cd .. && rsync -az --info=progress2 measurement/dist/ bonner-gpu.rice.edu:/var/www/html/bonner-gpu/bm/measurement/ && rsync -az measurement/measurement-expanation.mp3 bonner-gpu.rice.edu:/var/www/html/bonner-gpu/bm/measurement/ && echo '✓ measurement deployed'

tasks.label: Deploy all: commit, push & deploy measurement
Deploy: landing page → bonner-gpu
tasks.command: rsync -az --info=progress2 /tmp/bm_index.html bonner-gpu.rice.edu:/var/www/html/bonner-gpu/bm/index.html && rsync -az /tmp/bm_style.css bonner-gpu.rice.edu:/var/www/html/bonner-gpu/bm/css/main-style.css && echo '✓ landing page deployed'

tasks.label: Git: commit & push
tasks.command: git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet && echo 'nothing to commit' || (git commit -m '${input:commitMsg}' && git push && echo '✓ pushed to github')

tasks.label: Deploy all: commit, push & deploy hydrogen-atom
Deploy all: commit, push & deploy stern-gerlach
